controlSet.description: Restrict identity projections to the minimum necessary attribute set
Constrain when the projection may be linked back to the base identity
Require explicit invalidation path for withdrawn projections

rules: Require the minimum attribute subset needed for the declared context
Deny presentation outside permitted audience or use
Constrain correlation to declared linkage authorities and rules

threats.label: Over-Disclosure
threats.description: The presentation reveals more identity attributes than the context justifies

threats.label: Unauthorized Correlation
threats.description: A relying party or service correlates the projection back to the base identity without authority

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as an external artifact with a TSMM mapping.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
